overall.description: Gameplay footage from a stealth action game showing a bald agent in a vest exploring a tropical riverside shanty town during golden hour. The character moves from an interior room through metal rooftops with views of a river and city skyline, then through narrow corrugated metal passages and market areas.

events.description: character opens metal security gate and exits building to outdoor shanty area

agents.ego_description: walking from interior room toward metal security gate and stepping outside into the shanty town

entered.detail: green metal bunk beds with patterned blankets against the red wall
white ceiling fan hanging from the ceiling
heavy red curtains covering windows behind the beds
small wooden cabinet with items on top near the wall
metal security gate with vertical bars leading outside

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit interior room with green bunk beds, red curtains, and a ceiling fan. The character walks toward a metal security gate at the far end of the room, opens it, and steps outside into the shanty town, transitioning from indoor to outdoor space.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside shanty rooftops with panoramic city views

events.description: character ascends metal stairs from ground level to rooftop walkways
character reaches river overlook and pans camera to view city skyline and bridge

agents.ego_description: walking along corrugated metal rooftops and pausing to observe the river, boats, and distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: male NPC in striped shirt standing near wooden boat rack looking at the river

entered.detail: stairs made of corrugated metal leading up to rooftop level
tall palm trees surrounding the shanty structures
makeshift shacks constructed from corrugated metal sheets
large barrel painted with green and white horizontal stripes
wooden rack holding a small green and red boat
large concrete highway overpass with multiple support pillars spanning the river
wide river with small boats floating on the water
distant modern city skyline with tall skyscrapers and construction cranes
multiple construction cranes visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto rooftop walkways made of corrugated metal, surrounded by palm trees and makeshift shacks. The character walks past an NPC standing near a wooden boat rack, then stops at a scenic overlook to pan across the river, boats, a large concrete highway bridge, and the distant city skyline bathed in warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow shanty corridors with market stalls and food vendors

events.description: character enters narrow enclosed passage between corrugated metal shacks
character descends wooden stairs into lower crowded market area

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow passages between shacks, passing food stalls and descending stairs into a crowded market

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food stall tending to a steaming pot

entered.detail: string of red triangular flags hanging across the shanty structures
steep wooden stairs leading down to lower level
decorative skulls and bones hanging on sticks near the passage
wooden food stall with steam rising from cooking pots
white plastic chairs stacked near the wall
wooden market stall with shelves holding various goods
stack of cardboard boxes with 'HARPY' text visible
red and purple umbrellas shading market areas below

changed.to: left_near and right_near as enclosing walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open rooftop into narrow, semi-covered corridors between corrugated metal shacks adorned with hanging skull decorations and colorful bunting flags. The character passes a food stall with steam rising from pots, descends wooden stairs, and navigates through a crowded market area with cardboard boxes and colorful umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkways through shanty with bridge pillars visible

events.description: character exits crowded market into quieter elevated walkway with view of bridge pillars

agents.ego_description: continuing through elevated corrugated metal walkways toward more open area with palm trees and bridge views

entered.detail: outdoor air conditioning unit mounted on shack wall
massive concrete pillars supporting the highway overpass

segments.scene_description: The character continues through quieter elevated walkways made of corrugated metal, passing an air conditioning unit. The scene transitions from the crowded market to a more open walkway with palm trees and views of large concrete bridge pillars in the distance, maintaining the warm golden hour lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim interior room into the sprawling, sun-drenched rooftops and markets of a tropical shanty town. It begins inside a room with green bunk beds and red curtains, moving toward a metal security gate that opens to reveal the outdoor environment. As the character emerges onto corrugated metal walkways, the scene expands into a wide scenic overlook where the camera pans across a river and a distant city skyline bathed in warm golden hour light. The perspective then shifts into narrow, semi-covered corridors adorned with skull decorations and bunting flags, descending wooden stairs to pass through a steaming food stall and a crowded market filled with colorful umbrellas. Finally, the camera moves back onto quieter elevated walkways, passing an air conditioning unit before opening up to a view of massive concrete bridge pillars and palm trees under the glowing sky.
